overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza, descending stairs to street level, and crossing a road. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and cyberpunk aesthetic with purple and pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the reflective plaza surface toward the center of the open area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on bench near the plaza edge

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard with purple and pink neon graphics and text
towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the plaza
wet glossy floor tiles reflecting the neon lights above
elevated walkway structure connecting buildings with glass railings
large vertical digital advertisement showing a figure in pink neon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated plaza at night, surrounded by towering megabuildings covered in neon advertisements. The camera moves forward across wet reflective tiles that mirror the purple and pink glow of holographic billboards, including a prominent Kiroshi sign. The space is relatively empty with only a few scattered pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairwell descending from plaza to street

events.description: camera turns right to approach the stairwell entrance
enters enclosed stairwell with concrete walls and artificial lighting
lighting shifts from bright neon to dim yellow artificial as descent continues

agents.ego_description: turning toward the stairs and descending multiple flights while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing orange hat and white jacket descending stairs ahead

entered.detail: gray concrete walls with minimal lighting fixtures
silver metal handrail along the staircase edge
transparent glass panels providing view of street below

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and enters a concrete stairwell, transitioning from the open neon-lit plaza to a dimly lit enclosed space. As the descent continues down multiple flights, glass railings reveal the street level below while artificial wall lights replace the vibrant neon glow. Other pedestrians are encountered coming up the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: exits stairwell onto street level under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing food stalls and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street below the overpass

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright pink neon lighting and menu displays
massive concrete and steel highway overpass spanning the street
suspended rectangular screen displaying animated advertisements
dark reflective road surface with yellow lane markings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairs, the scene opens onto a street-level walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. A brightly lit pink food stall stands on the left while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. The area is illuminated by a mix of neon signs and overhead fluorescent lights, with the reflective wet asphalt street visible to the right where sparse traffic passes by.

events.description: steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red coat walking ahead across the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel stripes

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera stepping onto a wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes, crossing the intersection with other pedestrians. The overpass recedes behind as the camera moves toward the opposite corner lined with illuminated building facades and storefronts, completing the transition from the covered street to the open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated, neon-drenched plaza down to a bustling street-level intersection. It begins by gliding across wet reflective tiles that mirror the purple and pink glow of towering holographic billboards and Kiroshi signs. As the camera turns right, the open vibrancy of the plaza shifts into the dim, enclosed atmosphere of a concrete stairwell, where artificial wall lights replace the neon glow during the descent. The scene then opens onto a street-level walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing a brightly lit pink food stall and reflective asphalt. Finally, the camera steps onto a wide yellow-striped crosswalk, moving away from the overpass toward illuminated storefronts as it crosses the open intersection.
